# Extracao: Module 7

- **Tipo:** TXT

﻿MODULE 7 JOINT VENTURE LAUNCH

Welcome to Module 7 of Product Launch Formula. This is where you attract, train, and work with partners who will promote your product for you. By the end of this module you’ll be able to take what you learned about the Internal Launch and use it to create a Joint Venture Launch.

1 Introduction [2 minutes]
Introduction to Module 7: The Joint Venture Launch. This lesson will introduce you to the JV Launch and when to use this type of launch in your business.

2 Joint Venture Launch Strategy [10 minutes]
In this lesson you'll learn about the JV Launch strategy. The JV Launch uses all the same concepts, strategies and PLCs as the Internal Launch, but instead of relying only on your list, your JV partners will also launch to their lists. So a key part of this strategy is finding, attracting, and preparing your JV partners.

3 Finding Joint Venture Partners [12 minutes]
This lesson is about what makes a good JV partner and what to look for when thinking about potential JVs. It’s also about how to create a great experience for your partners, starting with having a value-first relationship mindset.

4 Getting Joint Venture Partners [17 minutes]
In this lesson, you’ll learn how to come up with your “Dream 20” list of JV partners and then how to actually land them. There are three steps to this: finding JVs, contacting them, and building relationships with them.

5 Preparing Your Partners for Launch [7 minutes]
In a JV launch, the most important launch you do is to your partners, to get them excited and prepared for your launch. The more engaged and prepared they are, the better results you’ll both have. This lesson will show you how.

6 Training and Supporting your Joint Venture Partners [14 minutes]
This lesson goes into more detail about how to effectively train and support your JV partners. It's all about how to get them engaged and emailing to your Prelaunch Content so they can send more people to your launch.

7 Joint Venture Email Sequence Walkthroughs [28 minutes]
In this walkthrough, you'll get a sneak peek into the actual JV Email Sequence we send to our JV Partners for our PLF Launch.

8 Joint Venture Launch Case Studies [43 minutes]
In these case studies, you'll see a walkthrough of real-life examples of JV Launches done by PLF Owners.

9 Joint Venture Launch Planner [no video]
The JV Launch Planner is a step-by-step action guide to help you plan out and execute your JV Launch.
